name: Accounting Ledger
author: civicognita
description: General ledger, double-entry bookkeeping, and basic financial reports for ops + administration projects

permissions.reason: Writes journal entries + chart of accounts

widgets.content:
## Accounting Ledger

Double-entry bookkeeping for the project. Stores entries in `k/mapps/accounting/`:

- `chart-of-accounts.json` — your account hierarchy (Assets, Liabilities, Equity, Revenue, Expenses)
- `ledger.jsonl` — append-only journal entries (one per line)
- `periods/<yyyy-mm>.json` — period close snapshots

### Common workflows

- **Add an account** — extend the chart of accounts with a new code + name
- **Post a transaction** — record a debit + matching credit (always balanced)
- **Run a report** — balance sheet (point-in-time) or income statement (period)

Ask the **categorization assistant** below to suggest accounts when posting a transaction.

prompts.label: Transaction Categorizer
prompts.description: Suggests chart-of-account codes for new transactions based on payee + memo + amount
prompts.systemPrompt: This is the project's accounting ledger MApp. When the user describes a transaction (payee, amount, memo, date), suggest the most appropriate debit + credit accounts from their chart of accounts. Always propose a balanced entry (debits = credits). If the chart of accounts is empty or missing the right category, suggest a new account code following the standard hierarchy (1xxx Assets, 2xxx Liabilities, 3xxx Equity, 4xxx Revenue, 5xxx Expenses, 6xxx Other). Be concise: one short paragraph + the proposed JE in tabular form.

prompts.label: Financial Report Narrative
prompts.description: Drafts a one-paragraph plain-language summary of a balance sheet or income statement
prompts.systemPrompt: Given a balance sheet or income statement (JSON or table format), write a one-paragraph plain-language summary highlighting the top three signals: largest balances, biggest changes vs prior period if available, and any unusual line items. Tone: professional but accessible to a non-accountant project owner.

tools.label: Recent Journal Entries
tools.description: Show the last 20 entries in the ledger
tools.command: tail -n 20 k/mapps/accounting/ledger.jsonl 2>/dev/null | jq -c '.' || echo 'No ledger entries yet — post your first transaction.'

tools.label: Chart of Accounts
tools.description: Print the current chart of accounts
tools.command: cat k/mapps/accounting/chart-of-accounts.json 2>/dev/null | jq '.' || echo 'No chart of accounts yet — create one with the categorization assistant.'

tools.label: Trial Balance
tools.description: Sum debits and credits across all accounts (balanced ledger sums to zero)
tools.command: if [ -f k/mapps/accounting/ledger.jsonl ]; then jq -s 'group_by(.account) | map({account: .[0].account, debit: (map(.debit // 0) | add), credit: (map(.credit // 0) | add)})' k/mapps/accounting/ledger.jsonl; else echo 'No ledger yet.'; fi
